description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style axe with a sleek, all-black finish. The handle is elongated and slightly curved, designed for ergonomic grip and leverage, and appears to be made from a single piece of metal, likely steel. The blade is angular with a sharp, pointed tip and a broad cutting edge, featuring a geometric cutout near the poll for weight reduction or multi-functionality. The axe head is integrated seamlessly with the handle, suggesting a full-tang construction for maximum durability. There are no visible fasteners or separations between the blade and handle, indicating a monolithic design. A small, subtle marking is present on the handle, possibly a logo or brand insignia.
description: A sleek, all-black tactical axe with a curved handle and angular blade featuring a geometric cutout. The design is modern and monolithic, with a subtle marking on the handle.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the axe, highlighting the curved handle and angular blade with a cutout.
description_view_1: Edge-on view emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the pointed tip, with the handle's curvature visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the blade's geometric cutout and the handle's ergonomic curve.
description_view_3: Reverse edge-on view, focusing on the blade's broad edge and the handle's underside.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic, all-metal handle with a sleek, monolithic design and subtle grip contours; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Angular, single-edged blade with a pointed tip and geometric cutout; no beard or poll; modern tactical style.
attribute_mounting_style: Monolithic, full-tang construction with blade and handle formed from a single piece of metal.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: stylized logo or marking on handle
